rawAssistant: Considering the east wind drags soot, a water-repellent coating would be wise to keep your travel cloak dry and functional. A light oil treatment or waxing might help, but don't forget to reapply after each dust-up with the road. I've got some spare threads in my stash that could add an extra layer of protection – might interest you for a small price, traveler?
